text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Patient alert, oriented to time/place, cooperative Hydrated skin and mucous membranes.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "BP: 110/70 mmHg - HR: 64 bpm R - SatO2: 99% on room air - Temp: 36°C Cardiac examination: valid, rhythmic tones, apparently free pauses Pulmonary examination: vesicular murmur diffusely present, no additional gross sounds Abdominal examination: abdomen flat, palpable, not tender or painful, no signs of peritonism.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "Murphy negative, no pain on palpation in renal fossa bilaterally Neurological examination: GCS 15, speech intact.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "No gross unilateral motor and sensory deficits: Mingazzini I and II normal, the cranial nerves examined (VII, V, XII, oculomotor) are intact.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_4] ("2026-01-01", "No abnormalities in thermotactile or pain sensitivity.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_5] ("2026-01-01", "No dysmetria, no nystagmus.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_6] ("2026-01-01", "Autonomous and stable walking, Romberg test negative.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_7] ("2026-01-01", "No gross hearing and visual deficits.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_8] ("2026-01-01", "No meningeal signs.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_9] ("2026-01-01", "Pain on palpation of the biceps bilaterally and in the forearm upon flexion-extension of the biceps.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_10] ("2026-01-01", "No musculoskeletal deformities.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_11] ("2026-01-01", "No signs of bruising or lacerated/contused wounds.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_12] ("2026-01-01", "No palpable lymphadenomegaly in the main lymph node stations.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_13] ("2026-01-01", "No peripheral edema, no signs of DVT.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_14] ("2026-01-01", "Peripheral pulses present, normal and symmetrical", 0.0, 0.1)
